rationale: The citing paper note centers on mobile-vs-nonmobile review cues on TripAdvisor and an effort/credibility mechanism, whereas the cited paper note is about causal effects of joining brand Facebook pages and selection effects, so overlap appears only broad (social media/UGC). Given this sparse evidence, it is not safe to confidently drop as obvious mention-only, but substantive use is also unproven.
